problem id: d50683b4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5)

examples:
  11010001 -> 00111010
  10010011 -> 01110010
  11101111 -> 11111101
  11110100 -> 10011110
  01110101 -> 10101110
  11111011 -> 01111111
  11111101 -> 10111111
  01110100 -> 10001110
  11111000 -> 00011111

query: 00110001
predicted answer: 00100110
